name: LV_123_QCFICHECHECK
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[LV_123_QCFICHECHECK] AS
SELECT DISTINCT
1 AS TRCODE,
ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES2 % 2) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY1,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES2 % 2) < 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY2
FROM LG_123_QASGN as QASGN
GROUP BY ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO
HAVING REVISIONNO = (SELECT MAX(REVISIONNO) FROM LG_123_QASGN WHERE ASGNTYPE = QASGN.ASGNTYPE AND ASGNREF = QASGN.ASGNREF AND SETREF = QASGN.SETREF)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT
2 AS TRCODE,
ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES3 % 2) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY1,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES3 % 2) < 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY2
FROM LG_123_QASGN as QASGN
GROUP BY ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO
HAVING REVISIONNO = (SELECT MAX(REVISIONNO) FROM LG_123_QASGN WHERE ASGNTYPE = QASGN.ASGNTYPE AND ASGNREF = QASGN.ASGNREF AND SETREF = QASGN.SETREF)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT
3 AS TRCODE,
ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES3 % 4) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY1,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES3 % 4) < 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY2
FROM LG_123_QASGN as QASGN
GROUP BY ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO
HAVING REVISIONNO = (SELECT MAX(REVISIONNO) FROM LG_123_QASGN WHERE ASGNTYPE = QASGN.ASGNTYPE AND ASGNREF = QASGN.ASGNREF AND SETREF = QASGN.SETREF)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT
4 AS TRCODE,
ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES3 % 8) > 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY1,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES3 % 8) < 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY2
FROM LG_123_QASGN as QASGN
GROUP BY ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO
HAVING REVISIONNO = (SELECT MAX(REVISIONNO) FROM LG_123_QASGN WHERE ASGNTYPE = QASGN.ASGNTYPE AND ASGNREF = QASGN.ASGNREF AND SETREF = QASGN.SETREF)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT
5 AS TRCODE,
ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES2 % 4) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY1,
SUM(CASE WHEN (INSPFICHES2 % 4) < 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OKAY2
FROM LG_123_QASGN as QASGN

HAVING REVISIONNO = (SELECT MAX(REVISIONNO) FROM LG_123_QASGN WHERE ASGNTYPE = QASGN.ASGNTYPE AND ASGNREF = QASGN.ASGNREF AND SETREF = QASGN.SETREF)
UNION ALL

FROM LG_123_QASGN as QASGN
GROUP BY ASGNTYPE, ASGNREF, SETREF, REVISIONNO
HAVING REVISIONNO = (SELECT MAX(REVISIONNO) FROM LG_123_QASGN WHERE ASGNTYPE = QASGN.ASGNTYPE AND ASGNREF = QASGN.ASGNREF AND SETREF = QASGN.SETREF)
